data.body:
## Description

Create the /dso:update-docs skill that invokes the doc-writer agent for standalone use outside sprint context.

### Implementation
1. Create directory plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/
2. Create SKILL.md with:
   - SUB-AGENT-GUARD block (Agent tool check variant — same pattern as sprint, brainstorm, etc.)
   - Usage: /dso:update-docs [commit-range]
   - Optional commit range parameter to scope git diff (default: main...HEAD)
   - Dispatch dso:doc-writer via subagent_type with epic/project context and git diff
   - Parse doc-writer output and report results
3. Add update-docs to tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh skill list
4. Write a RED test first: test that the skill file exists with SUB-AGENT-GUARD

### File Impact
- Source: plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md (create)
- Test: tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh (modify — add update-docs to checked skills)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Skill file exists at plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md
- [ ] SUB-AGENT-GUARD is present in SKILL.md
  Verify: grep -q 'SUB-AGENT-GUARD' plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md
- [ ] Skill accepts optional commit range parameter
  Verify: grep -q 'commit.range\|commit-range' plugins/dso/skills/update-docs/SKILL.md
- [ ] test-sub-agent-guard.sh includes update-docs
  Verify: grep -q 'update-docs' tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
- [ ] Sub-agent guard test passes
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh 2>&1 | grep -q '0 failed'
